How it works Pricing FAQ

Last updated: 19 February 2026

Privacy Policy

Your privacy matters to us. Here's exactly how we handle your data.

1. Information We Collect

Information you provide

When you create an account, we may collect your name, email address, profile photo, transaction data, and contact names you add manually.

Information collected automatically

We may collect device information, IP address, and usage logs to improve the service and resolve issues.

2. How We Use Your Information

  • Provide, maintain, and improve the Tally service
  • Authenticate your identity and secure your account
  • Send important service notifications
  • Respond to support requests
  • Analyse usage patterns to improve features

3. Data Storage & Security

Tally uses Google Firebase, which provides enterprise-grade security including encryption at rest and in transit.

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing. We may share data only with service providers bound by confidentiality, or as required by law.

5. Data Retention

We retain your data for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion at any time — we process requests within 30 days.

6. Your Rights

  • Access the personal data we hold about you
  • Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
  • Request deletion of your data
  • Object to or restrict processing
  • Data portability — receive a copy of your data

7. Cookies & Tracking

Tally may use cookies to maintain your session. You can control cookie settings through your browser.

8. Children's Privacy

Tally is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy periodically. Continued use of Tally after changes constitutes acceptance.

10. Contact Us

Questions about privacy? Contact us.

© 2026 Tally. All rights reserved.

Support Feedback Terms Privacy
